summary: Surah Al-Waqi’ah describes the great event of resurrection, dividing people into three groups: the foremost, the companions of the right, and the companions of the left. It details the rewards for the righteous and the punishment for the wicked, emphasizing that everyone will be judged according to their deeds. The surah invites reflection on the creation of man, crops, water, and fire, and underscores the certainty of the resurrection and the truth of the Qur’an.
